title: UCMuon: A simulation suite for cosmic-ray muon generation, transport, and muography
description: UCMuon (You See Muon!) is an open-source simulation suite for cosmic-ray muon generation, transport, and muography. It runs either locally through a browser-based graphical interface or as command-line executables on HPC clusters. It provides surface muon generation (eight spectrum models, three source geometries), seven transport engines (the native UCMuon-MC stochastic engine, MUSIC, Bethe-Bloch, PROPOSAL, PUMAS backward/forward Monte Carlo, a Python backward Monte Carlo, and DEM-based terrain ray-tracing for real field deployments), and a muographic density-inversion suite. Primary applications are volcano imaging and subsurface density monitoring. The MUSIC source code is not redistributed (see docs/MUSIC_FILES.md for how to obtain it); the PUMAS library is downloaded automatically by the installers.
